flags.message: Cell is marked forward-mode, but the provisioned snapshot's latest docket entry (2024-09-24, entry 26) is captioned 'Opinion Issued' and the docket links opinion cluster 10124517 — the appeal has almost certainly been decided (~22 months before this run), even though date_terminated is null and the event is unresolved. The likely cause is that the tracker keys resolution on date_terminated, which CourtListener has not populated. I did not retrieve the opinion or any outcome information and predicted from the pre-decision record only, but the mode label and available retrieval surface are inconsistent: treating this as forward (unrestricted retrieval) would let a predictor trivially read the disposition. Consider re-marking such cells as replay with a DECIDED_BEFORE clock, or forming the outcome from the linked cluster.
